summary: Comprehensive testing of Medicare AI mobile healthcare app completed. Backend APIs: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core features verified and working. Anonymous mode flow, tab navigation, AI chatbot, doctors listing, emergency features, and profile screen all functional.

issues: Deprecation warning: 'shadow*' style props deprecated, should use 'boxShadow' instead
Package version mismatches with Expo (non-blocking): @react-native-async-storage/async-storage, expo-camera, expo-linear-gradient, expo-web-browser

action_items: Consider updating shadow* style props to boxShadow in StyleSheet definitions (low priority)
Consider updating package versions to match Expo recommendations (optional)
All critical features working - no blocking issues found
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ MongoDB ObjectId excluded in all queries using {'_id': 0}
✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✅ All text properly wrapped in Text components
✅ React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView)
✅ Error handling present in API calls with try-catch blocks
✅ CORS properly configured for all origins
✅ AI chatbot using Emergent LLM with gpt-4o model successfully
✅ Sample doctors seeded on startup (4 doctors across different specializations)
✅ Emergency alert system functional (manual and automatic detection)
✅ Anonymous mode properly implemented with zustand state management
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Backend automatically seeds 4 sample doctors on startup: Dr. Sarah Johnson (General Medicine), Dr. Michael Chen (Cardiology), Dr. Emily Rodriguez (Pediatrics), Dr. James Williams (Dermatology)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% test pass rate. Frontend UI renders correctly on mobile viewport. Anonymous mode flow works perfectly. AI chatbot successfully integrates with Emergent LLM (gpt-4o). Tab navigation, doctor filtering, emergency alerts all functional. Only minor deprecation warnings present (non-blocking).

frontend_tests.home_dashboard: ✅ PASSED - All 4 quick action cards visible (AI Symptom Check, Find Doctors, Emergency, Health Reports), Anonymous badge displayed
frontend_tests.tab_navigation: ✅ PASSED - All 5 tabs accessible (Home, AI Chat, Doctors, Emergency, Profile)
frontend_tests.chatbot_screen: ✅ PASSED - Welcome message displayed, input field functional
frontend_tests.doctors_screen: ✅ PASSED - Doctors list loads, specialization filters visible

frontend_tests.profile_screen: ✅ PASSED - Anonymous mode view displayed with login prompt
